title: Internal replay history document
description: Strict JSON envelope used by the private Rust replay feeder. The history body is a canonical padded standard-base64 encoding of Temporal Core's History protobuf. Runtime validation additionally enforces the decoded byte limit and Core history invariants.

workflow_id.description: UTF-8 workflow identifier attached to the history because Temporal History does not contain it. The Rust validator applies the authoritative byte limit and rejects NUL bytes.

data.description: Padded standard-base64 text. The Rust validator decodes it, limits the resulting bytes to 128 MiB, and compares it with a canonical re-encoding.
